evals.prompt: Generate a component brief for Checkbox using the brief-data at plugins/actian-design-system/evals/component-brief/fixtures/checkbox-brief-data.json. Push the resulting frame to Figma file FaBwMaNkvdrcQIo3fl8I4D, page TBD-EVAL-PAGE-ID. Return the resulting frame's node ID as the last line of your output, prefixed with 'FRAME_NODE_ID='.
evals.expected_output: A component brief frame on the test page, with all Phase 1 token tables rendered at >=32px row heights, real frame names (not generic 'Frame'), Anatomy badges A and B present, Specs sub-frame present.

assertions.text: A1: Frame names contain real component-part names
A2: No row in Phase 1 token tables crushes below 32px
A6: Anatomy badges A and B exist

evals.prompt: Generate a component brief for Button using the brief-data at plugins/actian-design-system/evals/component-brief/fixtures/button-brief-data.json. Push the resulting frame to Figma file FaBwMaNkvdrcQIo3fl8I4D, page TBD-EVAL-PAGE-ID. Return the resulting frame's node ID as the last line of your output, prefixed with 'FRAME_NODE_ID='.
evals.expected_output: A component brief frame on the test page, with the Variation matrix rendering all variants from the fixture, real frame names, no token typos, Specs sub-frame present.

assertions.text: A1: Frame names contain real component-part names
